---
title: "About"
---

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
![Right on!](images/thumbs-up.jpg){.profile-image}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-8}
## About Me

I'm making some changes to make some changes.

- This website isn't for anyone.
- That's okay, not everything has to be for someone.

## Skills or areas of interest

- Data
- Words

## Links

- [Ars Technica](https://arstechnica.com)
- [New York Times](https://nytimes.com)
- [EDHRec](https://edhrec.com)
:::
:::
